title: malveopsis flabellata
intro: Malveopsis flabellata is a type of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the fan-leaved mallow. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malveopsis flabellata include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
